text.title: German Girl tries the best food spots in Korea (Seoul)
text.u: hello
everyone what's up this is going to be a
short intro because I already know this
video is going to be so long and I also
know that you want to be in Korea and
not here in this room with me right now
also I look like this and I just want to
spare you this but as a little
background I flew to Korea together with
the K Beauty skincare brand yapa I was
there for a week and I was trying to
find the best food spots I mean Korea
has so many food spots let's be honest
there's probably so much more but I
still think I had some good spots I
don't want to spoil anything but it was
mind opening so let's just go let's go
let's fly to Korea after an 11-hour
flight we have finally arrived in South
Korea so and this was the view we were
greeted with absolutely
breathtaking look at all those
chickens we are walking to our first
restaurant of the night I don't know how
close you
[Music]
are look at all of these palets
everything is open 24/7 basically so
much happening so much
happening okay so now we're at Jan which
is basically a bar/ restaurant
it's getting so
silent we're taking the shoes off
everyone I like Ramen I
like I like
sa okay so here you order at the table
that see all the food that's here they
have a lot of like just broths soups
jiggas this isn't just a p iPad to order
food you can game you can play games
against other tables or you can join the
gr chip the tables are just spring it's
Mai it's Korean wine and this is Peanut
flavor and you drink it out of these
bowls these are not rice bowls they are
M bowls I don't 100% remember what was
this first dish that we had but I think
it was nuni soybean paste jig nuni is
scorched rice and the stew is kind of
like soybean pasty and it wasn't that
spicy even though it looks spicy it's
not that spicy guys next I tried this
kim chi Chan which is a kimchi pancake
and I thought I know this I've eaten
this so many times in Berlin but somehow
this tasted so different so much more
flavorful I was actually blown away by
this kimchi John this next thing I try
it I don't know if it has a name but
basically it's silk and tofu with chives
kimchi and meat and just eat a whole
Spoonful that's it might seem simple but
was hitting the spot and then probably
my highlight of the night was this
powdered sugar covered cheese ball I
still dream of this to this day it's
sweet I need another one oh my God this
looks so good this is Buddha jigy with
like cheese and some kinds of meat
and when I tell you that I have enjoyed
my bout Jig I enjoyed it I think it was
the best one I've ever eaten my life
damn why did I not even blend my jawline
Contour not on camera
though but now you
are and then it was time to introduce me
to the word of soch which is beer AKA
Mech mixed with Soju if you don't know
what SOI is it is a clear and colorless
Korean distilled alcoholic beverage that
was definitely not red for from
Wikipedia and Xander wanted to show me a
very special way of mixing the SoJO with
the beer we going to do together we
going to hit on the
table as as I can two
one we are not in
for I'm
[Music]
[Applause]
I knew
it what did we just do yes so we had to
pose for 20% discount well we had we
didn't know it could be 10 to specify
the restaurant had a game going on which
was if you're cute enough you will get a
discount but you have to prove it by
posing for the staff but we got 20
because we were extra cute how did how
did you pose I didn't see I was like
this she was like oh yes give me that
discount we got it though so who's
laughing now
taking advantage of misogyny any
[Music]
day and it is the next day and we are
visiting the Yoda Factory this is where
the magic happens and where all of their
products are being made you can already
tell they take hygiene seriously when
you get these cute little shoes at the
beginning that you can dance in and do
the business walk in yes I showed Kyla
my business walk very important then I
saw that they actually have King robes
and I was hoping that we're going to put
them on and I found out we're going to
put them on and I was a happy girl it
actually kind of fit my outfit I I was
not complaining I'm dragging out to put
this on because I got lipstick
on and then it was time to see how the
vegan natural and cruelty-free K Beauty
skincare products were made and it was
actually really interesting to see the
products being put into their containers
and also lowkey satisfying I have to say
and that was our time in the
Factory and now it's time to go out for
dinner guys we're in Ean which is a very
loud district and it's actually like the
most
westernized District we were told that
it's also like the gay district we're
going to Maple treeh house and
everything it's so much music everywhere
I think this is copyrighted we are there
and it's actually Korean barbecue and we
were told it's really good so let's have
some [ __ ] Korean barbecue and Korea
[Music]
baby so we're sitting here barbecue
sauce on my titties and we actually have
Korean barbecue for beginners because
they're cooking it over there and then
they're putting it on there this is kind
of embarrassing such a good Korean
barbecue experience but this is not how
it's normally done here's the meat that
they cooked for us it actually looks
really
good it's so juicy wow
wow this is the
[Music]
gold Naomi approve
it we ordered eggs F because Vanessa
especially wanted this
a little bit of everything also a little
bit of egg Su because I'm feeling kind
of
crazy I don't know if this counts as a
Food Spot in Korea but I got this
lollipop from this guy who wanted me to
get into his Club I didn't go but I got
the lollipop we have one last stop for
the night which is angu crunchy syrup
covered fruits I can only try the second
one I'm the second flute let's see if it
tastes like the one that I
made actually mine was better and now
we're trying orange Mandarin what is
[Music]
it it's so sweet I don't know how to
feel about this the next day I don't
know if you can tell I mean you probably
can tell but I'm actually at a Korean
hairdresser place right now because
we're going to get a makeover a Korean
style makeover with like glass skin and
everything and I'm kind of nervous
because my skin is not necessarily the
best I also have no eyebrows we're also
going to get our hair done and then
we're going to have a photo shoot just
like a skin care focused photo shoot so
everything needs to look and I have no
idea what I will look like in the end
but I'm just going to let it happen and
pray to the gods said I look okay then
we got to meet the famous Korean makeup
artist hung shik and I got to show off
my Korean that I
learned I don't know what we're going to
do I have no idea I don't know if she
knows nobody knows she's going away
she's like I'm not doing
this what is typical Korean I don't know
I have no idea ask me she think it's
better this
way this thing it will suit you better
yeah you think cute you like it we're
going to do pigtails and she said she
wants to swoop my bangs to the side I
think it could look cute but it could
also look not cute I'm still a bit
nervous guys here's my final look here's
from the back I look so different I look
like a child I think so innocent but I
kind of like it I would just never do
this like myself so out of my comfort
zone but uh
cheers now we're going to get our makeup
done by Mr H he already did so many
K-pop Idols makeup so I I'm so excited
let's hope he's not going to die because
he sees my skin in my eyebrows I don't
know if he's going to paint in my
eyebrows so let's just see what happens
so first we're doing skin prep if
there's one thing that I learned in
Korea it is in order for your makeup to
look beautiful you need to prep your
face accordingly the three steps of
Glory first you need to double cleanse
your face then you need to moisturize SL
hydrate your face and then you need to
apply SPF and don't you think you can
skip a day doing
that you have very thin I have very thin
skin
yes challenge yes I'm getting new
eyebrows happy
[Music]
birthday what mascara yeah because we
want to make it very natural so that's
why super glowy super nice so now we're
going to the photo studio to take some
pictures I just got my makeup done by Mr
hum I think he was really struggling but
look he did my eyebrows he said I'm
going to do your eyebrows Korean style
they made my face look so much lighter
than my body I mean that's just what
they do in general but I think it makes
me look like a ghost so I don't know if
I feel like 100% comfortable but let's
see how it transfers on camera when we
do the photo shoot so let's go inside
we're doing a touchup again I don't know
what exactly the touching up there's
nothing to touch up because look like
I'm not wearing makeup but they're doing
it they're touching
up
[Music]
different
nice
[Music]
okay together very
close that's
guys we're in the gentle monster Cafe
and this is what you can buy here it is
actual food I know it doesn't look like
it what is this this was 40,000 €40,000
there's like also a cant inside I think
there it's all made of
K yeah M this is really good we have um
a sheep I'm going to try the butt okay
yes oh
tastes like nothing this is boring sorry
ooh look at the
jelly it's hard inside like a boiled egg
is it a
cant cant jelly the Germans can do
better jelly pudding SP the food of
[Music]
the second
try it's like lemon it definitely makes
it better though there is cheese on it
is
it no maybe if I reach the butter but
this is not giv now it's my favorite it
looks like plastic it looks like fake
[Music]
food want it's like quana T it's like a
little bit of lemon and very thick cream
but also a little bit fresh mhm MH hello
we are at our next Food Spot and it's
going to be this hot pot Place Shabu
shabo which is Japanese hot pot anyway
this is a very popular place let's go in
and have some hot
[Music]
pot we are back with this thing
apparently this is super common to have
this screen in a restaurant and just
order via this one it's actually really
amazing to be honest because you don't
even have to talk to people once again
we're drinking
soach I actually hate beer but for some
reason I like beer okay so we got um
meat donut in the middle there's the
broth and then you dip it in there
there's also fish cake in there I got
myself a fish cakes then we got some
mush mush m m muscle noodles we have
this egg and soy sauce and we break it
up and then we take the meat and we zip
it we zip it we zip
shrimp
toast very
hot shrimp toast shrimp
[Applause]
to I'm drunk hello I'm just eating
hello onang how do you like my new
microphone do you think I can eat like
[Music]
this and then for some reason the
photographer from the beauty shoot also
joined us and since he was always saying
that I was posing too sexy everyone
started showing him my music videos to
show him real sexy and then we started
talking about my tattoos and I showed
naika and Xandra my Kawaii tattoo which
means cute in Japanese and somehow we
got to the point where I said I want a
tattoo here in Korea and they said well
you should just tattoo yepa which means
pretty in Korean and my dumbass said
I'll do it well Xander bet against me
but um well you're going to see later
what I
did too much so and then we went to go
sing karaoke and there was free ice
cream and it's always good to have free
ice cream especially when you're dressed
as a strawberry what can I say karaoke
went hard we went off and BTS was
[Music]
banging
it the next day we actually wanted to
discover some of the cherry blossom
trees we were actually a little late so
a couple of the trees already died the
leaves were already on on the ground but
being the great influencers that we are
we still managed to take some
pictures Hello you actually didn't see
that much from today because what I did
today you will see in a different video
such as buying this Hello Kitty Star bag
it's a backpack but now let's get un
ready I've been wearing this makeup for
too long I got into my shirt that I've
been wearing for the past days as you
can tell I'm here with the aora you
might know it by now basically this
whole journey in Korea is sponsored by
yepa but I couldn't think of anybody
else that I would have this sponsored
rather rather have the sponsor so yapa
is a skincare brand that focuses on K
Beauty skincare which you probably also
got by now I have super sensitive skin I
have acne prone skin it's just all the
things that are difficult ask Mr hum a
challeng challeng and honestly guys with
yapa my skin actually is not behaving
too bad I don't want to like lean too
far out the window because my skin is
still not perfect whatsoever but I
really have been feeling good lately
with using their products and also the
values of yapa they're vegan they're
crueltyfree they only have clean
ingredients yapa is really a brand that
I would stand behind 100% by the way I'm
using the C balm this is makeup remover
oil so this is definitely my go-to
product from your P up so I'm going to
wash my face now and come back with no
makeup and now I'm going to apply the SE
boost hero vitamin C brightening serum
this might look a bit brutal when I'm
applying it but I swear it's been
helping my skin so much in general I
have sensitive skin and it just reacts
to everything that I apply so don't be
alarmed I feel so much shame in my face
being red sometimes and it's so stupid
because it's literally something I can't
control my skin is thin even when I was
younger like people were always pointing
out my red face there's nothing wrong
about red face I touch it it turns red
period we're applying the Midnight Magic
so in overnight cuz it just gives that
extra moisture and that extra glow and
that extra redness but only for a couple
of seconds oh and then I'm also just
going to put this onto this pimple right
here this is the spot stop this is my
face don't say anything don't don't you
say anything I have a code for you you
can use Naomi Korea for 20% off cool
right I'll put the link in the
description then you can check
everything out good night hello it is
the next day and I found a pink sandwich
isn't it beautiful the place was
literally just called egg drop in gangam
area I don't know what to expect I just
bought it because it's pink oh it's so
moist why is it so
[Music]
wet I'm not sure how to feel about
this I think there's like little
strawberry pieces mixed with cream this
is the sweetest thing I've ever tried in
my life and I think it's because the
bread is actually soaked in syrup hello
it's me again we are going to have some
more food
um we're going to have some more food at
Wang Chang
Market yeah good okay she approved um it
is apparently it is apparently a very
popular Market in jongo District and
we're going to eat some very popular
noodles by Grandma by Netflix by Netflix
Netflix Grandma so she apparently was in
a documentary and made the noodles there
and since then she's gotten super
popular and everyone wants to eat there
so let's look for the grandma it is very
busy so I hope I won't lose you I think
we're going to go to Netflix Grandma
first my Vlog is colliding with Vanessa
I'm colliding with
everything I don't know where the others
are I lost everybody hello the market
was stimulating every sense in my body
there was so much to see and smell and
eat but we wanted to get to Netflix
grandma she was famous for her guku
noodle soup which is a noodle soup with
hand cut noodles and as you can see she
does it well not even looking at it
anymore she just can do that blindly
because she's done it for so many years
so this is apparently the very famous
soup with the grandma Netflix noodles we
also have kimchi Mandu oh guys the
kimchi Mandu was so good the kimchi in
general oh the soup I have to say is a
little overhyped in my eyes I mean the
noodles were absolutely delicious but
the broth itself was a little tasteless
in my eyes like it was definitely a fish
based broth also you don't really have
that many other ingredients in the soup
so if you're not a fish broth kind of
girl then maybe this is not for you hi
guys this is Naomi John wait I need to
say it with more sass hi guys this is
Naomi John I had a little little style
change I would say I'm kidding I could
never be her oh yes with the noodle soup
with a water a soup yeah I'm not Kyla
I'm
Naomi Naomi is a there no no no I'm
Naomi oh sorry
Naomi it works this is my noodle soup
guys Naomi if you see this I like you
and I want you to want to be my friend
but I'm not good with making friends so
if you see this message do you want to
be my friend
[Music]
it's a little
[Music]
fishy right here we have also a very
famous place it's a donut place with the
Twisted donut I think it was also on
Netflix or something it's just really
famous the line is crazy long we've been
standing here for a couple of minutes
this Twisted donut is very very popular
and it actually looks very basic oh it's
also with um cinnamon and
sugar W it's so chewy but crunchy warm
sweet it's really good this is not
overhyped the next day we made a trip to
see the kyong buung palace and we were
even given the chance to wear a hul
which is traditional Korean clothing
that was worn back in history to be
honest with you first I was not sure if
I should wear one because I didn't want
to offend anyone or even appropriate the
Korean culture but I quickly realized
that the Korean actually see this as
appreciation and I even proud when a
foreigner wears a hbook so as you can
see of course I went for a pastel hook
with pink and purple in it and I thought
it was so beautiful I've never worn
anything like this and I honestly felt
like a princess and I was actually blown
away by the palace I did not expect it
to be this huge and this beautiful even
the fact that after so many years it
still looks this good I can't believe it
hello we're going to do a little Palace
Tour by onyang hi this Palace is called
Kung and then this Palace is from Josan
Dynasty and Josan Dynasty is the very
last Dynasty in in Korea before Japan
came and then conquered us because after
that they destroyed all the Royal system
and then all the you know all the all
the tradition the palace was built
around 16th century when Jan Dynasty uh
was established before that actually
there was another Dynasty called Kya and
the capital was actually in kesong in
North Korea and then now with Josan
Dynasty they move to Capital and then
since then actually since 15th century
so is the capital of like of Korea so
this is the main Palace so we have like
several palaces in Hall so but this is
main Palace according to the history
they used to have like a picnic here the
royal family yeah royal family or when
they have like special guests and they
would ride a boat here and then they
will also like have some dancers there
dancing and so on so this is mainly for
entertainment a party yeah party exactly
and then the dress that I'm wearing is
really Royal style so this is really
really tradition this is what queen
wears so you're the queen I'm the queen
you know Nami dress is a bit modernized
because in Korea nowadays like we really
are so proud of our Korean tradition and
that we really Tred to revive Korean
tradition because after japaneses came
also after westernization we kind of
destroyed all our tradition you know and
then now we are really sad about it so
we really want to bring it back because
Koreans are very like proud of uh people
like wearing hook because we really want
to share our culture so that's why we
are so happy to see like many people
from every parts of the world coming to
Korea visit Korea and especially visit
the palace and also wear this beautiful
humble so um I might be getting a tattoo
now I said I want to get it when I was
drunk I just stand by my word so we're
going to get it I want it like right
here on the
back what do you think
fine line do you want a fine line oh
then I think this side is good okay okay
feels like a fun little activity when
there's so many people here do you also
want friendship
tattoo
down on my belly hi guys it's getting
serious now oh poor girl she has to
smell my feet that I was walking around
all day I feel bad she said it's going
to
hurt do you know
left I don't know many do you know the
one that makes
M yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah guys we're
done look at it this is the final result
look at it it's so cute I think it
actually is the perfect size it looks
very like cute and small but also it's
still
there she got me this she said she uh
looked me up on Instagram and she
realized that I like pink so she was
like she got this for me
[Music]
and here ends the career trip and also
this video I can't even put into words
how much this week meant to me it's
always been my biggest dream to travel
to Korea to Soul the experiences I've
made there the things I saw the food
that I tasted the culture that I learned
about I have to say a huge thank you to
Yoda for organizing this whole trip for
doing all of the stuff together with us
I'm trying not to cry and to you
broccolis don't worry I have two more
videos that I filmed here in Korea I
have lots of more Soul content for you
but for now I'm going to say thank you
guys so much for watching and I will see
you in my next video and let's end this
video with Justin
Bieber baby baby baby
oh you
see
